name: pff_team_wins range year_offset sums the additive count window
description: pff_team_wins is an additive season count (not a grade), so its range year_offset reduces with SUM rather than AVG, while still emitting the self-contained subquery the dropped join alias requires.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT SUM(pff_team_seasonlogs.wins) FROM pff_team_seasonlogs WHERE pff_team_seasonlogs.nfl_team = player.current_nfl_team AND pff_team_seasonlogs.year IN (2024,2025)) AS "pff_team_wins_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
